name: Capital Sense Funding
description_short: Philadelphia-based business lender offering lines of credit up to $350K and merchant cash advances up to $2M with minimal documentation and rapid 24-hour funding.
description_long:
Capital Sense Funding (CSF) is a Philadelphia-based business capital provider founded to streamline access to funding for Main Street entrepreneurs. The company operates as a digital-first lender specializing in business lines of credit, merchant cash advances, and short-term business loans with emphasis on speed and reduced paperwork.

CSF offers three primary funding tiers: a $350K revolving line of credit with 650+ credit score and 3-year terms; a $100K line of credit for 600+ credit scores with 18-month terms; and business loans/MCAs up to $2M with no minimum credit score requirement. All products feature 100% digital application and funding processes designed to close within 24 hours. Notably, CSF funds based on bank statements alone—no tax returns required. The company also offers ancillary services including LLC/corporation registration and business startup packages for entrepreneurs without existing legal structures.

CSF differentiates itself through speed, simplified underwriting, and zero usage restrictions on capital. Their marketing emphasizes eliminating "red tape" and operating at "the speed of the streets." Beyond funding, they position themselves as a comprehensive ecosystem provider, offering business infrastructure support, strategic consulting, and professional branding services alongside capital. Their service area spans the USA and Canada.

While CSF presents attractive terms and speed advantages, potential borrowers should note the higher cost structure typical of non-traditional business lending (4% draw fees for lines of credit, MCA-specific repayment terms not detailed on site). The minimal documentation requirement reflects the higher-risk lending model. The company's emphasis on rapid approval over traditional underwriting suggests suitability primarily for established businesses with strong cash flow rather than startups or marginal operators.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Funding up to $350K available within 24 hours with 100% digital process
Bank statement-only underwriting eliminates tax return requirements
Revolving line of credit option allows borrowers to pay only for capital actually used
No minimum FICO score for up to $2M MCA/loan products (Option 3)
Zero restrictions on capital usage—funds can be deployed for any business purpose
Offers business formation services (LLC/corporation registration) for new entrepreneurs
Service area includes USA and Canada with no geographic restrictions
cons: 4% draw fee on revolving line of credit increases effective borrowing cost
Merchant cash advance terms (repayment structure, factor rates) not disclosed on website
Minimum requirements (600-650 credit score, 2 years in business, $10K+ monthly revenue) exclude early-stage and marginal businesses
Marketing language emphasizes speed over transparent cost disclosure—actual APR/total cost comparisons unavailable
No information on default rates, customer satisfaction, or third-party verification of claimed 24-hour funding claims
best_for: Established small businesses needing rapid working capital ($50K-$350K) with 2+ years operating history
Entrepreneurs requiring capital for inventory, equipment, or operational expansion without lengthy SBA approval timelines
Business owners with strong monthly revenue but limited tax return documentation or non-traditional income structures
New business founders who need concurrent LLC/corporation registration and initial capital access
diagnosis: Capital Sense Funding is best for established small businesses with 2+ years operating history, strong monthly cash flow ($10K+), and 600+ credit scores seeking rapid capital deployment without traditional SBA timelines or extensive documentation. The primary caveat is that published terms lack transparency on effective costs—draw fees and MCA factor rates are disclosed minimally, making true cost comparison difficult relative to traditional bank lines of credit or SBA loans.
services: Revolving business lines of credit up to $350K
Business line of credit with 650+ FICO (3-year max term, up to $350K)
Business line of credit with 600+ FICO (18-month max term, up to $100K)
Business startup packages for new entrepreneurs
Bank statement-based underwriting (no tax returns required)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 230 S Broad St Suite 805, Philadelphia, PA 19102
